version_description: Acoustic version as seen on the Tonight Show. Added notes about the C/G usage and why there is no Am chord.

versions.version_description: Very basic acoustic chord chart in the key of G. Can Capo up as needed (original song is in key of C).

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Acoustic Version as performed on "The Tonight Show"
Duet with Gwen and Blake
https://youtu.be/bPeXnuJBtrU

The C/G is a C chord with the pinky on the 3rd fret of the high E string
and is played this way the entire song based on what I saw Blake doing.
I know it sounds like there should be an Am in there but he's not playing
it that way on this acoustic version from what I can see.

[Intro]

[ch]C/G[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Csus4[/ch]

[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]C/G[/ch]                                [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]C/G[/ch]
  Don't have to leave this town to see the world[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Fadd9[/ch]                  [ch]C/G[/ch]
'Cause it's something that I gotta  do[/tab]
[tab][ch]C/G[/ch]                         [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]C/G[/ch]
  I don't wanna look back in 30 years[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Fadd9[/ch]                     [ch]C/G[/ch]
And wonder who you're married to[/tab]
[tab][ch]C/G[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]C/G[/ch]
  Wanna say it now, wanna make it clear[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Fadd9[/ch]                [ch]C/G[/ch]
For only you and God to hear[/tab]
[tab][ch]C/G[/ch]                                   [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]C/G[/ch]
  When you love someone, they say you set 'em free[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Fadd9[/ch]                     [ch]C/G[/ch]
But that ain't gonna work for me[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]C/G[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]C/G[/ch]
  I don't wanna live with out you[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Fadd9[/ch]
I don't wanna even breathe[/tab]
[tab][ch]C/G[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]C/G[/ch]
  I don't wanna dream about you[/tab]
[tab][ch]C/G[/ch]                    [ch]Fadd9[/ch]
Wanna wake up with you next to me[/tab]
[tab][ch]C/G[/ch]                             [ch]G[/ch]
I don't wanna go down any other road now[/tab]
[tab][ch]C/G[/ch]                   [ch]Fadd9[/ch]
I don't wanna love no body but you[/tab]
[tab][ch]C/G[/ch]                                   [ch]G[/ch]
Lookin' in your eyes now, if I had to die now[/tab]
[tab][ch]C/G[/ch]                [ch]Fadd9[/ch]
I don't wanna love nobody but you[/tab]
[tab] [ch]C/G[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Csus4[/ch]
You[/tab]


[Verse 2]

[tab][ch]C/G[/ch]                            [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]C/G[/ch]
  All the wasted days, all the wasted nights[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Fadd9[/ch]                 [ch]C/G[/ch]
I blame it all on being young[/tab]
[tab][ch]C/G[/ch]                        [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]C/G[/ch]
  Got no regrets 'cause it got me here[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Fadd9[/ch]               [ch]C/G[/ch]
But I don't wanna waste another one[/tab]
[tab][ch]C/G[/ch]                            [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]C/G[/ch]
  I been thinkin' about what I want in my life[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Fadd9[/ch]                [ch]C/G[/ch]
  It begins and ends the same[/tab]
[tab][ch]C/G[/ch]                         [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]C/G[/ch]
  If I had to choose what I couldn't lose[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Fadd9[/ch]       [ch]C/G[/ch]
There'd only be one thing[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]C/G[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]C/G[/ch]
  I don't wanna live with out you[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Fadd9[/ch]
I don't wanna even breathe[/tab]
[tab][ch]C/G[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]C/G[/ch]
  I don't wanna dream about you[/tab]
[tab][ch]C/G[/ch]                    [ch]Fadd9[/ch]
Wanna wake up with you next to me[/tab]
[tab][ch]C/G[/ch]                             [ch]G[/ch]
I don't wanna go down any other road now[/tab]
[tab][ch]C/G[/ch]                   [ch]Fadd9[/ch]
I don't wanna love no body but you[/tab]
[tab][ch]C/G[/ch]                                   [ch]G[/ch]
Lookin' in your eyes now, if I had to die now[/tab]
[tab][ch]C/G[/ch]                [ch]Fadd9[/ch]
I don't wanna love nobody but you[/tab]
[tab] [ch]C/G[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
You[/tab]
[tab][ch]C/G[/ch]             [ch]Fadd9[/ch]           [ch]C/G[/ch]
  I don't wanna love nobody but you[/tab]
[tab] [ch]C/G[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
You[/tab]
[tab][ch]C/G[/ch]             [ch]Fadd9[/ch]           [ch]C/G[/ch]
  I don't wanna love nobody but you[/tab]
